sourcesContent:
export const API_BASE_URL = 'https://npcpest.com/npc/';

export const API_ENDPOINTS = {
  LOGIN: 'userlogin.php',
  SIGNUP: 'usersignup.php',
  FETCH_SERVICES: 'fetch_services.php',
  FETCH_OFFERS: 'fetch_offers.php',
  CREATE_BOOKING: 'book_service_v2.php',
  GET_SERVICE_TYPES: 'get_service_types.php',
  GET_USER_SERVICE_DETAILS: 'get_user_service_details.php',
  LOCATIONS_MANAGER: 'locations_manager.php',
  // Admin endpoints
  ADMIN_LOGIN: 'adminlogin.php',
  ADMIN_SIGNUP: 'adminsignup.php',
  FETCH_ORDERS: 'fetch_orders.php',
  FETCH_EMPLOYEES: 'get_technicianss.php',
  FETCH_CONTACT_QUERIES: 'admin_contact_queries.php',
  ADD_OFFER: 'add_offers.php',
  DELETE_OFFER: 'delete_offers.php',
  ADD_SERVICE: 'add_service.php',
  SERVICES_MANAGER: 'services_manager.php',
  ASSIGN_TECHNICIANS: 'assign_technicians.php',
  RESET_PASSWORD: 'reset_password.php',
  GET_PROFILE: 'getprofile.php',
  UPDATE_PROFILE: 'userupdate.php',
  CHANGE_PASSWORD: 'change_password.php',
  SUBMIT_CONTACT_QUERY: 'submit_contact_query.php',
  USER_CONTACT_QUERIES: 'user_contact_queries.php',
  USER_NOTIFICATIONS: 'user_notifications.php',
  USER_BOOKINGS: 'user-bookings.php',
  MARK_NOTIFICATION_READ: 'mark_notification_read.php',
  GET_FCM_TOKEN: 'get_fcm_token.php',
  LOG_NOTIFICATION_REQUEST: 'log_notification_request.php',
} as const;

export const getApiUrl = (endpoint: string) => `${API_BASE_URL}${endpoint}`;
